title: The End of Your Third Year
prose: Three years in, and the summer feels shorter every time it comes — you've barely unpacked your trunk in your head before it's time to think about packing it again.
Fourth year has a reputation: harder classes, and, so the older students keep hinting, something rather bigger happening at Hogwarts this time around.

choices.label: Try and get some information out of a prefect before the summer's over.
